attacking_style: Launches long-range solo attacks on technical descents or gravel sectors (typically 12-36km out), then sustains via time-trial power. In sprints, initiates latest from chaos positioning, exploiting acceleration advantage over pure sprinters.
team_tactics: Jumbo-Visma employs dual-role flexibility: deploys him in early breakaways for intermediate sprint points (green jersey priority), uses full leadout trains on flat stages, or preserves him for GC protection duties on technical/windy finales. Numeric superiority with teammate duo breakaways renders traditional chase dynamics obsolete (E3 2022, multiple instances).
terrain_preference: Excels on rolling time-trial courses, gravel sectors, technical cobbled descents, and punchy uphill sprints up to 12% gradients. Can survive HC climbs when motivated (double-Ventoux win) but shows vulnerability on repeated steep explosive efforts (Paterberg accelerations).
vulnerability: Exposed by repeated explosive accelerations on steep gradients (15%+ climbs like Paterberg). Shows tactical hesitation in final 10 meters of sprints (poor bike-throw timing, premature celebrations). Vulnerable to pacing miscalculations in time trials (Dauphine 2022 collapse mid-effort). Indecisive when chasing multiple moves despite having legs.
key_patterns: Wins Tour de France stages across three consecutive years (2020-2022), multiple wins each edition
Launches from latest position in messy sprints, acceleration beats positioning chaos (4+ sprint wins)
Targets intermediate sprint points in early breakaways even on mountain stages, green jersey prioritized
Doubles as GC domestique and stage hunter within same race, preserves yellow jersey over stage ambitions
Superior recovery ability: works crosswinds/tempo then wins sprint next day (Tour 2020/2022)
Crashes and mechanicals severely compromise performance when forced to chase back (Paris-Roubaix 2019)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows declining results—zero wins despite desperate full leadout deployment at Tour, reduced to podium chasing at Paris-Roubaix, sprint timing indecision costing victories. Form deficit versus Van der Poel evident.
built_from: 2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 20
